3210190.name: Scaredy Cat Demo
3210190.description:
In the demo, play as Henny and start to uncover a web of secrets as you take on new jobs and side quests around Conhaven.


  • A lovingly crafted and emotional narrative with a deeper message
  • A perfect mesh of beloved 2D pixel graphics and narrative-as-a-pillar
  • Deep, well-developed characters that you can learn about at your own pace
  • Explore the city of Conhaven and its surroundings - beautiful pixel environments that eradiate spook and atmosphere


  • Select Pet Sitting Gigs
  • Solve environmental and cognitive puzzles - the demo features the first two levels from the full game
  • Care for critters and encounter supernatural horrors
  • Discover touching stories about pet owners
  • Progress through gigs to uncover a more sinister plot and become a more brave and purposeful Henny

Wishlist the full game to continue exploring intertwining mysteries. Decide how deep you'll dig for the truth with friends such as the anarchist, your work wife and others!
